description: Kill 300 enemies
hint: This will unlock naturally during your very first run.

description: Kill 2000 enemies
hint: Unlocks naturally as you play a few runs. High attack speed and AoE weapons speed this up.

description: Kill 5000 enemies
hint: Unlocks naturally over multiple runs.

description: Kill 10000 enemies
hint: Unlocks naturally after a few hours of gameplay.

description: Kill 20000 enemies
hint: Unlocks naturally as you grind through the different characters and difficulty levels.

description: Win a run in Danger 0
hint: Survive all 20 waves on the base difficulty. Prioritize surviving over damage if you are struggling, and invest in Max HP and HP Regeneration early.

description: Win a run in Danger 1
hint: Danger 1 spawns more enemies. Use characters with good wave clear like Loud or Mutant.

description: Win a run in Danger 2
hint: Danger 2 introduces more Elites/Hordes. Make sure you have high single-target DPS for Elites, or high movement speed to avoid Hordes.

description: Win a run in Danger 3
hint: Enemies hit harder and move faster. Focus heavily on Armor and Dodge to mitigate the increased damage.

description: Win a run in Danger 4
hint: More bosses and elites spawn. Use strong specialized characters like Knight (Armor/Melee) or Ranger (Ranged/SMG).

description: Win a run in Danger 5
hint: You will face two bosses on wave 20. High mobility and sustain are required. Characters like Masochist or Knight are very forgiving here.

description: Collect 300 materials
hint: Materials are the green drops from enemies. This unlocks naturally in wave 2 or 3 of your first run.

description: Collect 2000 materials
hint: Unlocks naturally during a standard 20-wave run.

description: Collect 5000 materials
hint: Unlocks naturally across your playthroughs.

description: Collect 10000 materials
hint: Unlocks naturally over time.

description: Collect 20000 materials
hint: Unlocks naturally over time as you grind out different characters.

description: Reach 200 Harvesting
hint: Play as the Farmer character or buy the 'Tractor' and 'Crown' items. Take Harvesting stat boosts on level up during the early waves.

description: Reach -5 HP Regeneration
hint: Play as the Chunky or Lich character, or just buy items that offer high offensive stats in exchange for negative HP Regeneration (like Blood Donation).

description: Reach 50 % Speed
hint: Play as the Speedy character, or focus on Speed upgrades during level ups and buy items like 'Alien Magic' or 'Wings'.

description: Hold 3000 materials
hint: Play as the Saver character. Stop buying items around wave 12-15 and just survive to stockpile materials.

description: Kill 50 trees
hint: Play as the Explorer character (starts with more trees spawned). Destroy every tree you see across a few waves.

description: Heal 200 HP in one wave
hint: Play as the Doctor or Bull. Stack high Max HP, Life Steal, and HP Regeneration. Intentionally take some damage and let your stats heal you.

description: Get 5 turrets on the map simultaneously
hint: Play as the Engineer. Buy Wrenches (each spawns a turret) and look for pocket factories or turret items in the shop.

description: Reach 60 % Dodge
hint: Play as the Ghost character, who gains Dodge rapidly by using Ethereal weapons. Cap is usually 60%.

description: Win a run with Brawler in Crash Zone
hint: Equip Unarmed weapons (like Fists) to scale massive attack speed and dodge.

description: Win a run with Bull in Crash Zone
hint: Bull cannot equip weapons. Stack Max HP, HP Regen, Armor, and Speed to ram into enemies.

description: Win a run with Chunky in Crash Zone
hint: Focus entirely on Max HP, Armor, and Melee Damage. Accept that you will have negative speed.

description: Win a run with Demon in Crash Zone
hint: Use materials to buy Max HP early on. Start with Ghost Scepters to permanently farm Max HP.

description: Win a run with Doctor in Crash Zone
hint: Equip 6 Medical weapons (Scissors/Syringes). You will have massive HP regen.

description: Win a run with Engineer in Crash Zone
hint: Build full Engineering. Equip Wrenches and Screwdrivers. Stay inside your turret clusters to survive.

description: Win a run with Entrepreneur in Crash Zone
hint: You lose all your money at the end of waves. Spend aggressively in the shop and rely on Harvesting for scaling.

description: Win a run with Explorer in Crash Zone
hint: Use Choppers to kill trees for massive loot. Build Speed to easily collect crates across the large map.

description: Win a run with Farmer in Crash Zone
hint: Equip Pruners. Let Harvesting scale your economy to astronomical levels by wave 15, then buy high-tier stats.

description: Win a run with Ghost in Crash Zone
hint: Equip 6 Ethereal weapons (Ghost Flint/Axe/Scepter). Cap your dodge at 90% and stack HP.

description: Win a run with Gladiator in Crash Zone
hint: You must use 6 DIFFERENT melee weapons to get the massive attack speed bonus.

description: Win a run with Knight in Crash Zone
hint: Equip 6 Swords. Stack Armor as high as possible, as your melee damage scales directly from it.

description: Win a run with Loud in Crash Zone
hint: High enemy spawn rate means high money. Use weapons with strong wave clear like SMGs or Slingshots.

description: Win a run with Lucky in Crash Zone
hint: Equip Slingshots. Stack the Luck stat heavily; your passive will clear enemies automatically as you pick up materials.

description: Win a run with Mage in Crash Zone
hint: Equip Taser or Wands. Focus entirely on Elemental Damage and getting 'Scared Sausage' or 'Snake' items.

description: Win a run with Masochist in Crash Zone
hint: Equip Scissors or Spiky Shields. Stack Max HP, Armor, and HP Regen. Let enemies hit you to boost your damage.

description: Win a run with Multitasker in Crash Zone
hint: Equip 12 Sticks. The scaling base damage of Sticks easily overrides the character's damage penalty.

description: Win a run with Mutant in Crash Zone
hint: Items are expensive, so rely on your passive +20% XP gain to carry you through level-up stats.

description: Win a run with Old in Crash Zone
hint: The map is smaller and you are slower. Engineering builds (Turrets) work perfectly here since you don't need to move much.

description: Win a run with One-Armed in Crash Zone
hint: Equip a Slingshot or SMG. Your single weapon gets massive +200% attack speed. Focus on flat Ranged Damage.

description: Win a run with Pacifist in Crash Zone
hint: Equip 6 Hands. Do not focus on killing; just stack Speed, Dodge, Max HP, and Harvesting to survive the timers.

description: Win a run with Ranger in Crash Zone
hint: Equip 6 SMGs or Crossbows. Focus purely on Ranged Damage and attack speed. You are weak to melee.

description: Win a run with Saver in Crash Zone
hint: Use a cheap weapon like Spears or Slingshots. Hoard your materials without spending to gain massive damage boosts.

description: Win a run with Sick in Crash Zone
hint: Equip SMGs. You start with high Life Steal but take damage over time. Fast-hitting weapons will keep you at full health.

description: Win a run with Soldier in Crash Zone
hint: You cannot attack while moving. Play stop-and-go. Guns with knockback like Shotguns work best.

description: Win a run with Speedy in Crash Zone
hint: Equip Lances or Shurikens. Keep running in large circles around the map to maximize your passive damage buff.

description: Win a run with Well-Rounded in Crash Zone
hint: Very flexible. 6 Sticks or 6 SMGs are straightforward and reliable builds for this character.

description: Win a run with Wildling in Crash Zone
hint: You cannot equip weapons higher than Tier 2 (Blue). Equip 6 Sticks, as their base scaling makes them strong even at lower tiers.

description: Die for the first time
hint: Unmissable. You will naturally die on your first few attempts while learning the game mechanics.

description: Win a run with Crazy in Crash Zone
hint: Equip Precise weapons like Knives, Shurikens, or Thief Daggers. Focus on Critical Chance.

description: Win a run with Generalist in Crash Zone
hint: Equip 3 Melee and 3 Ranged weapons. Cacti Clubs pair perfectly as they scale off both stats.

description: Win a run with Artificer in Crash Zone
hint: Equip Shredders or Rocket Launchers. Invest entirely in Explosive Damage and Armor.

description: Win a run with Hunter in Crash Zone
hint: Equip Crossbows or Sniper Rifles. Use your massive Range stat to safely clear the screen from afar.

description: Kill 15 enemies with a single explosion
hint: Play as Artificer with Rocket Launchers. Wait for a large horde to gather, then shoot a rocket into the center.

description: Reach 300 Range
hint: Play as Hunter. Invest in Range during level-ups and buy items like 'Scope' or 'Baby with a Beard'.

description: Recycle 12 weapons during a run
hint: Play as Arms Dealer, where you are forced to buy and recycle weapons every single wave.

description: Reach -20 % Speed
hint: Play as Chunky or Old. Buy heavy items like 'Anvil' or heavy armors that reduce speed.

description: Win a run with Arms Dealer in Crash Zone
hint: You lose your weapons every wave. Heavily invest in Harvesting early so you have the economy to buy new weapons constantly.

description: Win a run with Streamer in Crash Zone
hint: Stand completely still to generate money, then move to dodge when necessary. Wrench/Engineering build works perfectly for standing still.

description: Reach 10 Ranged Damage and get 3 structures at the same time
hint: Play as Cyborg or simply play a Ranger and buy a few Wrenches/Turrets during the shop phase.

description: Kill a boss or an elite in less than 15 seconds
hint: Play as Jack with Laser Guns, or Ranger with Sniper Rifles. Focus purely on high single-target burst damage.

description: Pick up 20 consumables during a run
hint: Consumables are the fruits that drop. Play as Explorer (more trees) or buy 'Pruners' (spawn fruits).

description: Reach 100 Max HP
hint: Play as Chunky or Golem and prioritize Max HP stats during every level up.

description: Win a run with Cyborg in Crash Zone
hint: Start with Miniguns. Halfway through the wave, your Ranged damage converts to Engineering, so have a mix of Guns and Wrenches.

description: Win a run with Glutton in Crash Zone
hint: Equip Pruners. Picking up fruits heals you and causes an explosion. Stack Explosive Damage.

description: Win a run with Jack in Crash Zone
hint: Enemies have +250% health but fewer spawn. Equip high burst weapons like Laser Guns or Revolvers.

description: Win a run with Lich in Crash Zone
hint: Healing deals damage to enemies. Equip Medical weapons (Scissors/Syringes) and stack HP Regeneration and Max HP.

description: Get 2 Bait during a run
hint: Bait is an item that spawns special enemies next wave. Buy it twice in the shop during a single run. Fisherman makes them appear constantly.

description: Finish a wave with 10 or more living trees
hint: Play as Explorer. Just run in circles and avoid shooting or destroying the trees.

description: Get 3 tier IV weapons at once
hint: Combine weapons in your inventory or buy Red (Tier IV) weapons from the shop late-game. Very easy on economic characters like Farmer or Entrepreneur.

description: Reach level 20
hint: Play as Mutant (+20% XP) or just survive until Wave 20 on Danger 1+; you will usually hit Level 20 naturally.

description: Finish a wave with 1 HP
hint: Play as Demon. Spend all your Max HP on items in the shop until you literally only have 1 Max HP left, then finish wave 1.

description: Get 10 different tier I items during a run
hint: Just buy 10 different cheap white items from the shop during the first few waves.

description: Win a run with Apprentice in Crash Zone
hint: You gain base stats upon leveling up but lose stats over time. Level up as fast as possible (stack XP items).

description: Win a run with Cryptid in Crash Zone
hint: Equip Claws. Leave trees alive to gain massive Dodge and Attack Speed bonuses.

description: Win a run with Fisherman in Crash Zone
hint: Equip Spears. Buy 1 or 2 Baits per shop early on to stack permanent Damage, but don't buy too many or you'll be overwhelmed.

description: Win a run with Golem in Crash Zone
hint: Equip Spiky Shields. You cannot heal, so stack Max HP and Armor incredibly high. Max HP buffs increase your speed and damage.

description: Win a run with King in Crash Zone
hint: Focus heavily on economy to upgrade your weapons to Tier IV (Red) as fast as possible, as Tier I weapons debuff you.

description: Win a run with Renegade in Crash Zone
hint: Equip SMGs. Your projectiles pierce, making fast-firing weapons incredible. Never merge your weapons past Tier 1.

description: Win a run with Vampire in Crash Zone
hint: You cannot regenerate HP normally. Stack high Life Steal and Max HP, and use fast-hitting weapons like SMGs.

description: Win a run with Vagabond in Crash Zone
hint: A versatile character. Pick a starting weapon class (like Sticks or SMGs) and stick with it.

description: Win a run with Baby in Crash Zone
hint: You take extra damage. Stack Dodge and Speed to avoid getting hit at all costs.

description: Reach 40 % Life Steal
hint: Play as Sick or Vampire. Take Life Steal on every level up and buy items like 'Bat' or 'Leech'.

description: Have 6 different weapons at once
hint: Play as Gladiator (requires 6 different melee weapons) or just buy 6 random cheap weapons on wave 2-3.

description: Reach level 10 before wave 6
hint: Play as Mutant (+20% XP) and buy XP boosting items like 'Scar' early.

description: Reach 10 Elemental Damage and get 3 structures at the same time
hint: Play as Mage or Artificer. Focus on Elemental damage, then just buy a few Wrenches or Turret items.

description: Win a run with Technomage in Crash Zone
hint: Equip Wands. Your Elemental Damage scales your Engineering. Buy turrets to supplement your wands.

description: Have at least 25 enemies burning at the same time
hint: Play as Mage with a Flamethrower, or any character using 'Scared Sausage' and high attack speed.

description: Reach 100 % Pickup Range
hint: Play as Farmer or buy items like 'Little Muscled Dude', 'Alien Magic', or 'Snail'.

description: Win a run with Buccaneer in Crash Zone
hint: Equip Cutlasses or Flintlocks. Focus on gaining a massive economy to buff your stats.

description: Win a run with Builder in Crash Zone
hint: Equip Wrenches. Similar to Engineer, prioritize turrets and defensive structures.

description: Win a run with Captain in Crash Zone
hint: Structures grant you buffs. Buy turrets and mines, and stay near them while using ranged weapons.

description: Kill 1000 enemies that are more than 700 range away from you
hint: Play as Hunter. Equip Sniper Rifles and stack Range stats. Stay in the corners of the map.

description: Win a run with Chef in Crash Zone
hint: Equip Pruners or Frying Pans. Use consumable-healing to boost your damage.

description: Win a run with Creature in Crash Zone
hint: Highly erratic. Stack Dodge and use weapons with fast attack speeds.

description: Win a run with Curious in Crash Zone
hint: Your stats change randomly. Build a generalist loadout with strong base-damage weapons like SMGs or Cacti Clubs.

description: Win a run with Diver in Crash Zone
hint: Stack speed and dodge. Weapons with high movement speed modifiers are essential.

description: Win a run with Druid in Crash Zone
hint: Equip Pruners. Harvesting scales your damage, so invest entirely in economy and survivability.

description: Win a run with Dwarf in Crash Zone
hint: You are slow but extremely tanky. Equip heavy melee weapons like Hammers or Choppers and build Armor.

description: Win a run with Gangster in Crash Zone
hint: Equip Pistols or Tommy Guns. Focus on high burst damage and critical strikes.

description: Collect 250 consumables by the end of wave 20
hint: Play as Glutton or Explorer. Buy Pruners (which spawn consumables) and stack Luck.

description: Win a run with Hiker in Crash Zone
hint: Moving gives you buffs. Keep running around the edges of the map using weapons you can fire on the move.

description: Win a run with Ogre in Crash Zone
hint: Equip Clubs or heavy melee weapons. Stack Max HP and Melee Damage.

description: Deal 1000 damage to an enemy in a single hit
hint: Play as Jack using Laser Guns, or Artificer using high-tier Explosives.

description: Win a run with Romantic in Crash Zone
hint: You get bonuses for having paired weapons. Keep your weapon types diverse but paired (e.g., 2 SMGs, 2 Swords, 2 Sticks).

description: Win a run with Sailor in Crash Zone
hint: Focus on high Harvesting and economy items. Water-based weapons excel here.

description: Walk a total of 20000 steps
hint: Unlocks naturally across a few runs, especially if you play Speedy or high-mobility characters.

description: Finish a run with 0 Curse
hint: Curse is a DLC mechanic. Simply avoid taking any items that add Curse to your stats.

description: Reroll 10 times in a single shop
hint: Play as Saver or Entrepreneur. Save up ~300+ materials and just spam the reroll button in late-game shops.

description: Hit at least 25 enemies with a single melee attack
hint: Play as Gladiator with sweeping weapons (Circular Saw, Greatsword). Stack melee range and attack into a dense horde.

description: Win a run with Well-Rounded in The Abyss
hint: Use a standard 6 Stick or 6 SMG build to easily clear The Abyss map.

description: Win a run with Brawler in The Abyss
hint: Equip Unarmed weapons. Stack attack speed and dodge.

description: Win a run with Crazy in The Abyss
hint: Equip Precise weapons (Knives/Shurikens) and stack Crit Chance.

description: Win a run with Ranger in The Abyss
hint: Equip SMGs or Crossbows. Keep your distance from the Abyssal enemies.

description: Win a run with Mage in The Abyss
hint: Equip Tasers or Wands. Focus on Elemental Damage and burning effects.

description: Win a run with Chunky in The Abyss
hint: Build pure Max HP and Armor. You won't outrun Abyssal enemies, so tank them.

description: Win a run with Old in The Abyss
hint: Use an Engineering build with Wrenches to lock down an area.

description: Win a run with Lucky in The Abyss
hint: Equip Slingshots. Maximize Luck to let your passive deal damage.

description: Win a run with Mutant in The Abyss
hint: Use SMGs. Rely on rapid level-ups for your stats.

description: Win a run with Generalist in The Abyss
hint: Mix Melee and Ranged. Cacti Clubs are still highly recommended.

description: Win a run with Loud in The Abyss
hint: Expect massive swarms. Wave clear weapons like SMGs or sweeping Melee are required.

description: Win a run with Multitasker in The Abyss
hint: Equip 12 Sticks. The sheer base damage easily carries.

description: Win a run with Wildling in The Abyss
hint: Equip 6 Sticks and just stack flat Melee damage.

description: Win a run with Pacifist in The Abyss
hint: Equip 6 Hands. Stack Speed and Dodge, and just run out the clock.

description: Win a run with Gladiator in The Abyss
hint: Use 6 different Melee weapons to benefit from the massive attack speed boost.

description: Win a run with Saver in The Abyss
hint: Hoard materials. Try not to drop below 3000 late game.

description: Win a run with Sick in The Abyss
hint: Equip SMGs for rapid Life Steal healing.

description: Win a run with Farmer in The Abyss
hint: Equip Pruners and let Harvesting carry your economy.

description: Win a run with Ghost in The Abyss
hint: Equip Ethereal weapons and cap your dodge at 90%.

description: Win a run with Speedy in The Abyss
hint: Equip Lances or Shurikens. Never stop moving.

description: Win a run with Entrepreneur in The Abyss
hint: Spend all your money in the shop every wave.

description: Win a run with Engineer in The Abyss
hint: Wrenches and Screwdrivers. Box yourself into a corner with turrets.

description: Win a run with Explorer in The Abyss
hint: Use Choppers. Farm trees for items and materials.

description: Win a run with Doctor in The Abyss
hint: Medical weapons provide insane sustain in the Abyss.

description: Win a run with Hunter in The Abyss
hint: Sniper Rifles and massive Range stats keep you safe.

description: Win a run with Artificer in The Abyss
hint: Shredders or Rocket Launchers. Maximize Explosive Damage.

description: Win a run with Arms Dealer in The Abyss
hint: Rely heavily on early Harvesting to afford weapons each wave.

description: Win a run with Streamer in The Abyss
hint: Stand still to earn cash, build turrets to protect your AFK spot.

description: Win a run with Cyborg in The Abyss
hint: Start with Miniguns and transition to Turret damage mid-wave.

description: Win a run with Glutton in The Abyss
hint: Equip Pruners and blow enemies up by picking up fruits.

description: Win a run with Jack in The Abyss
hint: Laser Guns are best for bursting down the tanky Abyssal enemies.

description: Win a run with Lich in The Abyss
hint: Stack HP Regeneration and Max HP with Medical weapons.

description: Win a run with Apprentice in The Abyss
hint: Stack XP items to outpace your stat decay.

description: Win a run with Cryptid in The Abyss
hint: Equip Claws. Don't destroy the trees.

description: Win a run with Fisherman in The Abyss
hint: Equip Spears. Buy Bait moderately to avoid getting overwhelmed.

description: Win a run with Golem in The Abyss
hint: Spiky Shields. Pure Max HP and Armor.

description: Win a run with King in The Abyss
hint: Rush Tier IV (Red) weapons.

description: Win a run with Renegade in The Abyss
hint: Keep 6 Tier 1 SMGs. Projectile piercing shreds crowds.

description: Win a run with One-Armed in The Abyss
hint: Slingshots or SMGs. Focus heavily on Ranged Damage.

description: Win a run with Bull in The Abyss
hint: You cannot equip weapons. Max HP, Armor, and HP Regen are your friends.

description: Win a run with Soldier in The Abyss
hint: Play stop-and-go. High fire rate weapons work best.

description: Win a run with Masochist in The Abyss
hint: Spiky Shields. Get hit intentionally to deal massive damage.

description: Win a run with Knight in The Abyss
hint: Swords and full Armor build.

description: Win a run with Demon in The Abyss
hint: Use Ghost Scepters to farm HP, spend freely early on.

description: Win a run with Baby in The Abyss
hint: Avoid getting hit. Speed and Dodge are crucial.

description: Win a run with Vagabond in The Abyss
hint: Flexible build path, Stick with your starting weapon class.

description: Win a run with Technomage in The Abyss
hint: Wands and Engineering turrets.

description: Win a run with Vampire in The Abyss
hint: High Life Steal and fast weapons like SMGs.

description: Win a run with Sailor in The Abyss
hint: Water weapons and high economy.

description: Win a run with Curious in The Abyss
hint: Adapt to random stat changes. Use reliable weapons like Cacti Clubs.

description: Win a run with Builder in The Abyss
hint: Wrenches and Turrets. Defend your zone.

description: Win a run with Captain in The Abyss
hint: Use structures for buffs. Turrets are a must.

description: Win a run with Creature in The Abyss
hint: High Dodge and Attack Speed.

description: Win a run with Chef in The Abyss
hint: Pruners. Consumables heal and buff damage.

description: Win a run with Druid in The Abyss
hint: Pruners. Focus solely on Harvesting.

description: Win a run with Dwarf in The Abyss
hint: Choppers or Hammers. Very slow, heavily armored.

description: Win a run with Gangster in The Abyss
hint: Pistols or Tommy Guns. High Crit and Burst.

description: Win a run with Diver in The Abyss
hint: Stack Speed. Highly mobile Abyssal weapons.

description: Win a run with Hiker in The Abyss
hint: Keep moving constantly to maintain buffs.

description: Win a run with Buccaneer in The Abyss
hint: Cutlasses/Guns and prioritize a massive economy.

description: Win a run with Ogre in The Abyss
hint: Clubs, high Max HP and Melee.

description: Win a run with Romantic in The Abyss
hint: Use paired weapons (e.g., 2 Swords, 2 SMGs, 2 Spears).

description: Win a run with Beast Master
hint: Focus entirely on items that spawn pets or summons.

description: Win a run in Nightmare
hint: Nightmare (Danger 6) is brutally difficult. High sustain, armor, and wave-clearing builds (like Loud with SMGs or Knight with Swords) are recommended.

description: Win a run with Wounded
hint: Focus entirely on dodge items. Remember, getting hit = you die.
